name: Route Guard Complete
description: Route guards (auth checks, role checks, feature flags) must be decomposed to verify that all route × auth-state combinations are handled correctly.
rationale: Missing route guards expose protected pages to unauthorized users. Decomposition ensures every route is checked against every possible auth state: logged out, logged in (no role), admin, expired token, etc.

examples.passes: Decompose(routeGuard) → 24 regions covering all route × role × token-state combinations
examples.fails: Admin dashboard accessible with an expired token because the guard only checks role, not token validity
